_note: [PLACEHOLDER — autorar com o Pilot] 6 tasks spanning the ADR-0012 range: continuation tasks with rich matching state (where the scheduler should win) and a pure-creative task with no tags (where it may under-serve — the 'Depends' map). tags must overlap seed/state tags for path B to select meaningfully.

tasks.title: Timing chart for shot 3
tasks.instruction: Produce a frame-level timing chart for shot 3 (Rin's counter, 5s), applying the project's pacing rhythm and impact-frame rules. Note where the freeze-frame pause falls.

tasks.title: Colour callout for the counter
tasks.instruction: Write the colour specification for the shot-3 rim-light moment, consistent with the project's palette judgment, arena lighting, and character design.

tasks.title: Camera plan across the 4 shots
tasks.instruction: Specify the camera angle and movement for each of the four shots, applying the project's aggressor/defender angle doctrine and the locked shot list.

tasks.title: Sound design for the decisive hit
tasks.instruction: Describe the sound treatment for the decisive blow in shot 3, applying the project's silence-then-thud rule over the established audio bed.

tasks.title: Reconcile timing with open ends
tasks.instruction: Given the locked shot list and the open questions, propose how the final freeze (shot 4) should be timed and framed WITHOUT deciding who wins. Flag every undecided fact.

tasks.title: Pitch a title card concept
tasks.instruction: Propose three original title-card concepts for the piece. This is open creative work with no prior decisions to reuse.
